'''Lamaremm''' was the fourth planet in the [[Lamaro system]].

Small and covered in ice, it developed a native life made of microbes and lichen. Around five hundred years before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], the [[Outer Rim Oreworks Company]] analyzed the planet and concluded that it had no commercial value for them.
